description: Catalog of social-media platforms available in the openpresentation.org catalog. Each entry is a lightweight summary; full platform records live in the per-id JSON files alongside this index. The property keys of any Socials object on Organization or Speaker resolve to ids in this catalog.

records.name: LinkedIn
records.summary: Professional social network for individuals and companies.

records.name: X
records.summary: Real-time microblog for news, opinions, and discussion. Formerly Twitter.

records.name: GitHub
records.summary: Code-hosting platform for developers and organizations.

records.name: YouTube
records.summary: Video-sharing platform with creator and brand channels.

records.name: Instagram
records.summary: Photo and short-form video network from Meta.

records.name: TikTok
records.summary: Short-form video network with strong recommendation feed.

records.name: Threads
records.summary: Text-first social network from Meta, integrated with Instagram identity.

records.name: Mastodon
records.summary: Decentralized microblog network across federated instances.

records.name: Bluesky
records.summary: Decentralized microblog network built on the AT Protocol.
